user.title: Set up Innova Duepuntozero
user.description:
Enter your Innova account credentials.

**Note:** Only email/password login is supported. Sign-in via Google or other OAuth providers is not yet implemented.

data_description.innova_email: The email address you use to sign in to the Innova app.
data_description.innova_mac_address: The MAC address of your air conditioning unit, e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF. You can find it in the Innova app under device settings.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect – please check your email address and password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the device as a fallback when the event stream is active. Set to 0 to disable polling entirely (not recommended).
